rawContent: Task: 260409-111824 | Outcome: completed | Observation: Task 260409-111824 successfully created an isOdd utility function in src/utils/math.ts with all 7 pipeline stages completing in 212 seconds and zero retries across all stages. However, the verify stage reported FAIL with typecheck errors in .next/dev/types/validator.ts (TS2344 type constraint failures on modal and ErrorPage.test imports), yet the ship stage proceeded to completion without blocking. This run exhibits the same verify-then-ship pattern failure documented in retrospectives for runs 832 and 841, where verification failures do not prevent pipeline progression to the ship stage. | Pattern: This is the third consecutive instance of the identical pattern (runs 832, 841, and now 260409-111824) where verify-stage typecheck failures fail to block deployment. The previous two retrospectives both recommended adding a conditional gate in ship to check verify exit status, but the flaw persists unchanged, indicating the recommendation was not implemented. | Suggestion: Implement the conditional gate in the ship stage that was recommended in the two prior retrospectives: check verify stage exit status and halt with a clear error message when verify reports FAIL, rather than proceeding silently to ship. | Flaw: verify — Verify stage FAIL status does not prevent pipeline progression to ship stage | Stages: taskify:completed, plan:completed, build:completed, verify:completed, review:completed, review-fix:completed, ship:completed
